title: Cocyclic Development of Designs
relevance: Foundational paper introducing cocyclic Hadamard matrices

title: A Heuristic Procedure with Guided Reproduction for Constructing Cocyclic Hadamard Matrices
relevance: Genetic algorithm for cocyclic Hadamard search over dihedral groups

title: On D4t-Cocyclic Hadamard Matrices
relevance: Classification results for cocyclic Hadamard matrices over D_{4t} up to order 44

title: On Cocyclic Hadamard Matrices over Goethals-Seidel Loops
relevance: Extends cocyclic framework to Moufang loops, showing GS-type matrices are pseudococyclic

title: Group actions on Hadamard matrices
relevance: Theory of cocyclic development and group actions on the expanded design
